question: Decode tokens back to text using tiktoken.
template:
import tiktoken

enc = tiktoken.get_encoding('gpt2')
tokens = [40, 1233, 508]
text = enc.???(tokens)
print(f"Decoded: {text}")
answer:
import tiktoken

enc = tiktoken.get_encoding('gpt2')
tokens = [40, 1233, 508]
text = enc.decode(tokens)
print(f"Decoded: {text}")
